name: yesil-sehir-projesi
description: Yeşil Şehir Projesi — Algoritma Tasarımı ve Analizi

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build: npm run install:all && cd client && npm run build
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "node server/index.js" "npx -y vite client"
